name: vercel-plugin
description: Comprehensive Vercel ecosystem plugin with Codex-compatible skills, hooks, and MCP.

interface.longDescription: Bring Vercel ecosystem guidance into Codex with curated skills, project-profiling hooks, and the official Vercel MCP server. This import packages the upstream vercel/vercel-plugin runtime surfaces with the manifest and hook adjustments Codex needs.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo for Vercel deployment risks
Which Vercel tools fit this app best
Help wire Vercel MCP into this workflow
